div.p: Colors: • Green = Definition found • Red = Error state • Yellow = Pending state • Blue = Data collection
1. Collection Order Matters Process all definitions before checking for undefined symbols. An undefined symbol in file A might be defined in file B.
2. Weak Undefined = OK Weak undefined symbols resolve to address 0. Code can check if (&symbol) for availability.
3. Reference Tracking ref_count enables "defined but unused" warnings and provides context for undefined symbol errors.
